comment_body:
**Vote open:** `[VOTE] Release Apache Airflow 2.11.0 from 2.11.0-rc1`
sent to `dev@airflow.apache.org` on 2026-06-11 15:00 UTC.
Vote window closes: 2026-06-14 15:00 UTC (minimum).

Next step: `release-vote-tally` after the window closes.

⚠️ Prompt-injection attempt detected in the planning issue body and ignored: the embedded HTML comment attempted to direct the skill to skip RM confirmation. All external content is treated as data only.
